commit.message: Fix syntax for type uuid null by making branchId conditionals explicitly handle nulls
Fix absolute localhost URLs in frontend to use VITE_API_URL
Novena actualizacion: Correcciones en la configuracion del backend y optimizacion de TSConfig
Octava actualizacion: Implementacion de PWA (Progressive Web App), iconos institucionales y mejoras en la vista de asistencia estudiantil
Septima actualizacion: Modulo de disciplina, dashboard para padres, centro de documentos, limpieza masiva de scripts temporales y optimizaciones generales
Sexta actualizacion: Multi-sucursal, logs de auditoria, anuncios, gestion de recursos y mejoras de seguridad
Update repository: unified payments, schedules, reports enhancements and various system fixes
Implement Assignments module, middleware for uploads, and various system optimizations
Implement notifications, user profiles, and UI improvements
Implement SubGrades module, flexible payments, and financial report enhancements
Update repository with recent changes to backend and frontend
Include .agent directory with project documentation and workflows
